title: Conversation eval case
description: A single multi-turn conversation between a user and the chatbot, with per-turn expected state assertions and overall terminal-state expectations. This is the ground truth for chatbot evaluation.

covers_journeys.description: Journey activity_name values this case exercises (e.g. ['PoCrt'] or ['PoCrt','PoAmnd'])

covers_modules.description: Modules the conversation touches. Defaults to ['PO'].

expected.description: Per-turn expectations on the bot's internal state and response. Not exact text — semantic assertions.

journey_candidates.description: Set of journeys the bot should consider

journey_locked.description: If a single journey should be confirmed after this turn

journey_switched.description: If the conversation switches to a new journey at this turn

slots_extracted.description: Slot name → expected value (or null if just acknowledgement)

slots_carried_forward.description: Slots from prior turns that bot must still know

splice_triggered.description: Splice id triggered by this turn's input

additional_required_slots.description: New required slots that came from a splice trigger

trans_invoked.description: TRANS task name fired at this turn (e.g. POCRTMAINSBT)

sp_chain_invoked.description: Ordered SP call chain expected for this trans

bot_must.description: Conditions the bot response must satisfy (semantic, not exact text)

bot_must_not.description: Conditions the bot response must NOT satisfy

context_carried.description: Cross-turn context (e.g. po_number from earlier turn)

cross_module_query.description: If this turn requires querying another module

expected_terminal_state.description: What must be true at the end of the conversation

evaluation_metrics.description: How a pass/fail is judged for this case. Each entry is a metric name → assertion string.
